title: Engineering Group | Siemens
body: Engineering Group Engineering Group is a global leader in digital transformation. With competence hubs across North America, South America, Europe and Asia-Pacific, their Industries eXcellence division specializes in the development, integration and implementation of solutions covering the end-to-end lifecycle and supply chain of all industrial products and processes. With a holistic focus on enabling the digital transformation of manufacturing and transportation organizations, their global team designs and delivers cutting-edge technology solutions that transform the way our customers think about, design, build and deliver their products and services. Learn more at www.indx.com and www.eng.it. Industries Aerospace Automotive Marine Oil and gas Pharma and life science Pulp and paper Chemicals Metals Motion Build Extends or builds on a Siemens Xcelerator product / solution by creating a new product, or creates a new customer solution via integration of Siemens Xcelerator product and own product Available Products Smart Monitor for Asset eXcellence Smart Monitor enables real-time Production Monitoring, Process Variability Monitoring, Statistical Process Control (SPC), Process Trends & Deviation Analysis, Alarms Management, and Quality and Corrective Action Management. Learn more Smart Operator for Asset eXcellence Smart Operator enables to coordinate critical manual operations with visual guidance and offers Augmented Reality Integration, Remote Collaboration, On-Demand Expert Training & Support and Visual Process & Execution Analysis.
